summary: 30Y TIPS yield at 2.48% on Feb 12, declined from 2.63 over prior 8 days. Bootstrap simulation over 8 trading days gives symmetric distribution centered at 2.48.
content: Latest value: 2.48% (Feb 12). Notable 15bp decline from 2.63 peak. Full sample daily volatility: 2.66bp std. Near-zero drift over 3.5 months. 8 trading days to Feb 25 (accounting for Presidents Day Feb 16).
